member.name: T:Reqnroll.Analytics.AnalyticsRuntimeTelemetryService
member.summary: A helper class that aggregates all dependencies required to send runtime telemetry events.

member.summary: A helper class that aggregates all dependencies required to send runtime telemetry events.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Assist.IValueComparer
member.summary: A class that will compare a key->value from a table to an actual value.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Assist.IValueComparer.CanCompare(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines if this comparer can compare the actual value to a key->value set defined in a table.
member.returns: true if this instance can compare the value to a key->value set in a table; otherwise, false.
member.param: Actual value.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Assist.IValueComparer.Compare(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Compare the expected value to the actual value.
member.param: Expected value.
Actual value.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Assist.IValueRetriever
member.summary: A class that will retrieve an object's actual value from a key->value in a table.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Assist.IValueRetriever.CanRetrieve(System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String},System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Determines if this retriever can retrieve the actual value from a key->value set in a table.
member.returns: true if this instance can retrieve the specified key->value; otherwise, false.
member.param: Key value pair.
The type of the object that is being built from the table.
The type of the property or member that is being set.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Assist.IValueRetriever.Retrieve(System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String},System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Retrieve the value from a key-> value set, as the expected type on targetType.
member.param: Key value pair.
The type of the object that is being built from the table.
The type of the property or member that is being set.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Assist.RowExtensionMethods.CreateInstance``1(Reqnroll.DataTableRow)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of from the .
member.typeparam: The type of the instance to be created.
member.param: The table row.
member.returns: A new instance of filled with the data from the .

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Assist.RowExtensionMethods.CreateInstance``1(Reqnroll.DataTableRow,System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Creates a new instance of from the .
member.typeparam: The type of the instance to be created.
member.param: The table row.
The method to create a new instance.
member.returns: A new instance of filled with the data from the .

member.name: P:Reqnroll.Assist.ValueRetrievers.DateTimeOffsetValueRetriever.DateTimeStyles
member.summary: Gets or sets the DateTimeStyles to use when parsing the string value.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.Assist.ValueRetrievers.DateTimeValueRetriever.DateTimeStyles
member.summary: Gets or sets the DateTimeStyles to use when parsing the string value.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.InstanceComparisonExtensionMethods.IsEquivalentToInstance``1(Reqnroll.Table,``0)
member.summary: Indicates whether the table is equivalent to the specified instance by comparing the values of all columns against the properties of the instance. Will return false after finding the first difference.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.BindingAttribute
member.summary: Marker attribute that specifies that this class may contain bindings (step definitions, hooks, etc.)

member.name: P:Reqnroll.StepDefinitionBaseAttribute.Expression
member.summary: A cucumber expression or a regular expression (regex) that matches the step text.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.StepDefinitionBaseAttribute.ExpressionType
member.summary: The type of used for matching the step text, a cucumber expression or a regular expression (regex).

member.name: T:Reqnroll.GivenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies a 'Given' step definition that matches for the provided regular expression.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.GivenAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.param: A cucumber expression or a regular expression (regex) that matches the step text.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.WhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies a 'When' step definition that matches for the provided regular expression.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.WhenAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.param: A cucumber expression or a regular expression (regex) that matches the step text.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.ThenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies a 'Then' step definition that matches for the provided regular expression.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.ThenAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.param: A cucumber expression or a regular expression (regex) that matches the step text.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.StepDefinitionAttribute
member.summary: Specifies a step definition that matches for the provided regular expression and any step kinds (given, when, then).

member.name: M:Reqnroll.StepDefinitionAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.param: A cucumber expression or a regular expression (regex) that matches the step text.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Bindings.Discovery.BindingSourceProcessor.GetExpressionString(Reqnroll.Bindings.Discovery.BindingSourceAttribute)
member.summary: Get the string from the step definition attribute.
member.remarks: The expressionString what called in Reqnroll v1+v2 Regex, and since v3 Expression

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Bindings.IStepArgumentTransformationBinding
member.summary: Represents a custom step definition parameter binding

member.name: P:Reqnroll.Bindings.IStepArgumentTransformationBinding.Name
member.summary: The optional name of the custom parameter. The name can be used in cucumber expressions.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.Bindings.IStepArgumentTransformationBinding.Regex
member.summary: The regular expression matches the step argument. Optional, if null, the transformation receives the entire argument.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.Bindings.IStepArgumentTransformationBinding.Order
member.summary: The deterministic order for step argument transformation

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Bindings.Provider.BindingProviderService.DiscoverBindings(System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String)
member.summary: Invoked by the Visual Studio extension connectors. Do not remove or change the signature.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.Bindings.Reflection.IBindingMethod.Type
member.summary: The declaring type of the method.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.Bindings.Reflection.IBindingMethod.ReturnType
member.summary: The return type of the method or null for void methods.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.Bindings.StepInstance.Keyword
member.summary: Keyword (including trailing spaces) used in the original specs or null if unknown.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BindingSkeletons.StepTextAnalyzer.GetDateFormats
member.summary: note: space separator not supported to prevent clashes

member.name: E:Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer.ObjectCreated
member.summary: Fired when a new object is created directly by the container. It is not invoked for resolving instance and factory registrations.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer.RegisterTypeAs``2(System.String)
member.summary: Registers a type as the desired implementation type of an interface.
member.returns: An object which allows to change resolving strategy.
member.param: A name to register named instance, otherwise null.
member.exception: If there was already a resolve for the .

remarks.para: Previous registrations can be overridden before the first resolution for the .

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer.RegisterInstanceAs``1(``0,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Registers an instance
member.param: The instance implements the interface.
A name to register named instance, otherwise null.
Whether the instance should be disposed on container dispose, otherwise false.
member.exception: If there was already a resolve for the .

remarks.para: Previous registrations can be overridden before the first resolution for the .
The instance will be registered in the object pool, so if a (for another interface) would require an instance of the dynamic type of the , the will be returned.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer.RegisterInstanceAs(System.Object,System.Type,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Registers an instance
member.param: The instance implements the interface.
Interface will be resolved
A name to register named instance, otherwise null.
Whether the instance should be disposed on container dispose, otherwise false.
member.exception: If there was already a resolve for the .

remarks.para: Previous registrations can be overridden before the first resolution for the .
The instance will be registered in the object pool, so if a (for another interface) would require an instance of the dynamic type of the , the will be returned.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer.RegisterFactoryAs``1(System.Func{Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer,``0},System.String)
member.summary: Registers an instance produced by . The delegate will be called only once and the instance it returned will be returned in each resolution.
member.param: The function to run to obtain the instance.
A name to resolve named instance, otherwise null.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer.RegisterFactoryAs``1(System.Func{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Registers an instance produced by . The delegate will be called only once and the instance it returned will be returned in each resolution.
member.param: The function to run to obtain the instance.
A name to resolve named instance, otherwise null.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer.Resolve``1
member.summary: Resolves an implementation object for an interface or type.
member.returns: An object implementing .

remarks.para: The container pools the objects, so if the interface is resolved twice or the same type is registered for multiple interfaces, a single instance is created and returned.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer.Resolve``1(System.String)
member.summary: Resolves an implementation object for an interface or type.
member.param: A name to resolve named instance, otherwise null.
member.returns: An object implementing .

remarks.para: The container pools the objects, so if the interface is resolved twice or the same type is registered for multiple interfaces, a single instance is created and returned.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer.Resolve(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Resolves an implementation object for an interface or type.
member.param: The interface or type.
A name to resolve named instance, otherwise null.
member.returns: An object implementing .

remarks.para: The container pools the objects, so if the interface is resolved twice or the same type is registered for multiple interfaces, a single instance is created and returned.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer.ResolveAll``1
member.summary: Resolves all implementations of an interface or type.
member.returns: An object implementing .

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer.IsRegistered``1(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the interface or type is registered in the container, optionally with the specified name.
member.param: The name or null.
member.returns: true if the interface or type is registered; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IObjectContainer.IsRegistered(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the interface or type is registered in the container, optionally with the specified name.
member.param: The interface or type.
The name.
member.returns: true if the interface or type is registered; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IStrategyRegistration.InstancePerDependency
member.summary: Changes resolving strategy to a new instance per each dependency.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BoDi.IStrategyRegistration.InstancePerContext
member.summary: Changes resolving strategy to a single instance per object container. This strategy is a default behaviour.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.BoDi.ObjectContainer.ResolutionList
member.summary: A very simple immutable linked list of .

member.name: P:Reqnroll.BoDi.ObjectContainer.ConcurrentObjectResolutionTimeout
member.summary: Sets the timeout for thread-safe object resolution. By default, it uses the value of that is initialized to 1 second. Setting it to disables thread-safe resolution.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Configuration.JsonConfig.CustomTimeSpanConverter
member.summary: Custom converter to stay compatible with old json format/parser

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Configuration.ObsoleteBehavior
member.summary: Describes possibilities what to do when a test is marked with The default is

member.name: T:Reqnroll.DataTable
member.summary: Represents a Gherkin Data Table.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider
member.summary: Provides build metadata information from various CI/CD environments by reading their specific environment variables. Supports multiple build servers including Azure Pipelines, TeamCity, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and others.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.#ctor(Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.IEnvironmentInfoProvider,Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.IEnvironmentWrapper)
member.summary: Provides build metadata information from various CI/CD environments by reading their specific environment variables. Supports multiple build servers including Azure Pipelines, TeamCity, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and others.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetVariableOrUnknown(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the value of an environment variable safely.
member.param: The name of the environment variable to retrieve.
member.returns: The value of the environment variable if it exists and can be accessed; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetBuildMetadata
member.summary: Retrieves build metadata from the current CI/CD environment by detecting the build server type and extracting relevant information from environment variables.
member.returns: A object containing build information such as build URL, number, repository details, revision, branch, and tag information. Returns null if the build server is not recognized or supported.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetAzurePipelinesMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from Azure Pipelines environment variables. Handles special tag extraction from BUILD_SOURCEBRANCH when it contains refs/tags/ prefix.
member.returns: A object with Azure Pipelines-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetTeamCityMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from TeamCity environment variables.
member.returns: A object with TeamCity-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetJenkinsMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from Jenkins environment variables.
member.returns: A object with Jenkins-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetGitHubActionsMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from GitHub Actions environment variables. Constructs build URL and remote URL from GitHub-specific variables and handles branch/tag detection.
member.returns: A object with GitHub Actions-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetGitLabMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from GitLab CI environment variables.
member.returns: A object with GitLab CI-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetAwsCodeBuildMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from AWS CodeBuild environment variables.
member.returns: A object with AWS CodeBuild-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetTravisMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from Travis CI environment variables.
member.returns: A object with Travis CI-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetAppVeyorMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from AppVeyor environment variables.
member.returns: A object with AppVeyor-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetBitbucketMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from Bitbucket Pipelines environment variables.
member.returns: A object with Bitbucket Pipelines-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetBambooMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from Atlassian Bamboo environment variables.
member.returns: A object with Bamboo-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetCircleCiMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from CircleCI environment variables.
member.returns: A object with CircleCI-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetGoCdMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from GoCD environment variables.
member.returns: A object with GoCD-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetBuddyMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from Buddy environment variables.
member.returns: A object with Buddy-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetNevercodeMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from Nevercode environment variables.
member.returns: A object with Nevercode-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetSemaphoreMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from Semaphore environment variables.
member.returns: A object with Semaphore-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetBrowserStackMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from BrowserStack environment variables.
member.returns: A object with BrowserStack-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetCodefreshMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from Codefresh environment variables.
member.returns: A object with Codefresh-specific build information.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildMetadataProvider.GetOctopusDeployMetadata
member.summary: Extracts build metadata from Octopus Deploy environment variables.
member.returns: A object with Octopus Deploy-specific build information.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames
member.summary: Contains constant values for build server names used across environment detection and metadata extraction.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.AzurePipelines
member.summary: Microsoft Azure Pipelines (formerly Visual Studio Team Services).

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.TeamCity
member.summary: JetBrains TeamCity continuous integration server.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.Jenkins
member.summary: Jenkins automation server.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.GitHubActions
member.summary: GitHub Actions CI/CD platform.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.GitLabCI
member.summary: GitLab CI/CD platform.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.AwsCodeBuild
member.summary: Amazon Web Services CodeBuild.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.TravisCI
member.summary: Travis CI continuous integration service.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.AppVeyor
member.summary: AppVeyor continuous integration service.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.BitbucketPipelines
member.summary: Bitbucket Pipelines CI/CD service.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.Bamboo
member.summary: Atlassian Bamboo continuous integration server.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.CircleCI
member.summary: CircleCI continuous integration platform.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.GoCD
member.summary: GoCD continuous delivery server.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.Buddy
member.summary: Buddy CI/CD platform.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.Nevercode
member.summary: Nevercode mobile CI/CD platform.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.Semaphore
member.summary: Semaphore continuous integration platform.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.BrowserStack
member.summary: BrowserStack testing platform.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.Codefresh
member.summary: Codefresh CI/CD platform.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.OctopusDeploy
member.summary: Octopus Deploy deployment automation server.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.BuildServerNames.CodeShip
member.summary: CodeShip continuous integration service.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.EnvironmentInfoProvider
member.summary: This provides an abstraction for obtaining platform and runtime information. Used by Analytics and Cucumber Messages

member.name: T:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.IEnvironmentOptions
member.summary: Well-known settings that are provided by the environment through an implementation.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.IEnvironmentWrapper.GetEnvironmentVariables(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Retrieves all environment variables that start with the specified prefix, optionally removing the prefix from the keys in the returned dictionary.
member.param: If true, the prefix will be removed from the keys in the returned dictionary.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.EnvironmentAccess.VariableSubstitutionService
member.summary: Provides functionality to resolve template strings by substituting placeholders with environment variables or built-in values.
member.remarks: This service supports replacing placeholders in the format "{env:VARIABLE_NAME}" with the corresponding environment variable value, and "{timestamp}" with the current date and time, or one of {buildNumber}, {revision}, {branch}, or {tag} with the corresponding information from BuildMetadata. Placeholders that do not match a known variable or environment variable are left unchanged. This class is typically used to dynamically generate strings such as file paths or configuration values that depend on runtime context.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.AmbiguousBindingException
member.summary: This subclass is added for support of Cucumber Messages. When emitting the Cucumber Message that describes an ambiguous matching situation, the Message will contain the list of possible matches. We use this subclass of BindingException to convey that information.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.ErrorHandling.PendingScenarioException
member.summary: This exception is thrown by Reqnroll test execution framework plugins to indicate a pending scenario if there is no dedicated support for pending errors in the test execution framework for that.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Events.TestThreadExecutionEventPublisher.PublishEvent(Reqnroll.Events.IExecutionEvent)
member.summary: Publishes the specified execution event to the appropriate handlers or subscribers.
member.remarks: This method blocks the calling thread until the event is published asynchronously.
member.param: The execution event to be published. Cannot be .

member.name: F:Reqnroll.ExpressionType.Unspecified
member.summary: Unspecified, the expression is a Regular expression (Regex) or a Cucumber expression. The expression type will be determined at runtime based on the expression string.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.ExpressionType.CucumberExpression
member.summary: The expression is a Cucumber Expression

member.name: F:Reqnroll.ExpressionType.RegularExpression
member.summary: The expression is a Regular expression (Regex)

member.name: P:Reqnroll.FeatureInfo.FeatureCucumberMessages
member.summary: This property holds the cucumber messages at the feature level created by the test class generator; populated when the FeatureStartedEvent is fired. Used internally.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.Configuration.FormattersConfigurationProvider
member.summary:
This class is responsible for determining the configuration of the Cucumber Messages subsystem. It is wired into the object container as a singleton and is a dependency of the PubSub classes.
When any consumer of this class asks for one of the properties of , the class will resolve the configuration (only once).
One or more profiles may be read from the configuration file () then environment variable overrides are applied (first , then ).

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Formatters.Configuration.FormattersConfigurationProvider.ResolveTemplatePlaceholders(System.String)
member.summary: Replaces all recognized placeholders in the specified template string with their corresponding values.
member.param: The template string containing placeholders to be resolved. Placeholders should be in the expected format for variable substitution.
member.returns: A string with all recognized placeholders in the template replaced by their resolved values. If no placeholders are found, returns the original template string.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.AttachmentTracker
member.summary: Tracks the addition of a particular attachment. The and are optional, they are only filled out if the attachment is added in a scope of a scenario or step/hook execution.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.FeatureExecutionTracker
member.summary: FeatureExecutionTracker is responsible for tracking the execution of a Feature. There will be one instance of this class per gherkin Feature.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.HookStepExecutionTracker
member.summary: This class is used to track execution of hook steps.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.HookStepExecutionTracker.#ctor(Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestCaseExecutionTracker,Reqnroll.Formatters.PayloadProcessing.Cucumber.ICucumberMessageFactory,Reqnroll.Formatters.PubSub.IMessagePublisher)
member.summary: This class is used to track execution of hook steps.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.HookStepTracker
member.summary: Tracks the information needed for a Cucumber Messages "hook step", that is a hook with binding information. The hook step needs to be built upon the first execution attempt of a pickle.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.HookStepTracker.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Tracks the information needed for a Cucumber Messages "hook step", that is a hook with binding information. The hook step needs to be built upon the first execution attempt of a pickle.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.OutputMessageTracker
member.summary: Tracks the logging of an output message. The and are optional, they are only filled out if the attachment is added in a scope of a scenario or step/hook execution.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.PickleExecutionTracker
member.summary: Tracks the execution lifecycle and state of a single Gherkin scenario (Pickle/TestCase).

list.item: Maintains scenario-level and feature-level execution data for a single test case.
Records each execution attempt (including retries) as a .
Processes and responds to all relevant execution events (scenario, step, hook, attachment, output).
Tracks step definitions and their mapping to execution steps within the scenario.

remarks.para: There is one PickleExecutionTracker instance per scenario (Pickle) in a feature.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.PickleExecutionTracker.OrderFixingMessagePublisher
member.summary:
Ensures correct message ordering for Cucumber messages by buffering messages until a message is published.
Responsibilities:
Buffers all messages until a message is encountered.
Flushes buffered messages immediately after the message is published.
Passes through all subsequent messages directly to the underlying publisher.
This is necessary because the message has IDs that are referenced in Pickle Execution messages.
Initializes a new instance of the class for a specific scenario (Pickle).
member.param: The unique identifier of the scenario (Pickle) being tracked.
The identifier of the test run this scenario belongs to.
The name of the feature containing this scenario.
Indicates whether this test case is enabled for execution.
The ID generator used to create unique IDs for test case messages and related entities.
A thread-safe dictionary mapping step definition patterns to their unique IDs, used to resolve step bindings during execution.
The timestamp marking when the test case started execution.
The factory responsible for creating Cucumber message objects.
The factory for creating TestExecutionTracker objects.
The service that publishes Messages to Formatters

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.StepExecutionTrackerBase
member.summary: Base class for tracking execution of steps (test steps and hooks)

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.StepExecutionTrackerBase.#ctor(Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestCaseExecutionTracker,Reqnroll.Formatters.PayloadProcessing.Cucumber.ICucumberMessageFactory,Reqnroll.Formatters.PubSub.IMessagePublisher)
member.summary: Base class for tracking execution of steps (test steps and hooks)

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestCaseExecutionTracker
member.summary: Track the execution of a single TestCase (i.e. an execution of a Pickle) There will be multiple of these for a given TestCase if it is retried.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestCaseExecutionTracker.TestCaseStartedId
member.summary: The ID of this particular execution of this Test Case

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestCaseTracker
member.summary: Tracks the information needed for a Cucumber Messages "test case", that is a pickle with binding information, so it captures for every step and hook the related step definitions. The test case needs to be built upon the first execution attempt of a pickle.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestCaseTracker.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.IPickleExecutionTracker)
member.summary: Tracks the information needed for a Cucumber Messages "test case", that is a pickle with binding information, so it captures for every step and hook the related step definitions. The test case needs to be built upon the first execution attempt of a pickle.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestRunHookExecutionTracker
member.summary: Captures information about TestRun Hooks (Before/After TestRun and Before/After Feature)

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestRunHookExecutionTracker.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,Reqnroll.Formatters.PayloadProcessing.Cucumber.ICucumberMessageFactory,Reqnroll.Formatters.PubSub.IMessagePublisher)
member.summary: Captures information about TestRun Hooks (Before/After TestRun and Before/After Feature)

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestStepExecutionTracker
member.summary: This class is used to track the execution of test steps.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestStepExecutionTracker.#ctor(Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestCaseExecutionTracker,Reqnroll.Formatters.PayloadProcessing.Cucumber.ICucumberMessageFactory,Reqnroll.Formatters.PubSub.IMessagePublisher,Gherkin.CucumberMessages.IIdGenerator)
member.summary: This class is used to track the execution of test steps.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestStepTracker
member.summary: Tracks the information needed for a Cucumber Messages "test case step", that is a step with binding information. The test case step needs to be built upon the first execution attempt of a pickle.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestStepTracker.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Reqnroll.Formatters.ExecutionTracking.TestCaseTracker)
member.summary: Tracks the information needed for a Cucumber Messages "test case step", that is a step with binding information. The test case step needs to be built upon the first execution attempt of a pickle.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.FileWritingFormatterBase
member.summary: Formatter plugin base that receives Cucumber messages and let the implementor process them and generate a single output file.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.Html.HtmlFormatter
member.summary: Produces an HTML report file based on https://github.com/cucumber/html-formatter/ and https://github.com/cucumber/react-components.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.Message.MessageFormatter
member.summary: Produces a Cucumber Messages output (.ndjson) file.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.PayloadProcessing.Cucumber.CucumberMessageFactory
member.summary: This class provides functions to convert execution level detail into Cucumber message elements. These are typically called after execution is completed for a Feature.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.PayloadProcessing.Cucumber.CucumberMessageVisitorBase
member.summary: Base implementation of a visitor pattern over the Cucumber Message types (consumer of this, for now, is within the Test class for Messages; but provided here for future use)

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.PayloadProcessing.Cucumber.EnvelopeExtensions
member.summary: Convenience methods to help work with Message Envelopes

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.PayloadProcessing.NdjsonSerializer
member.summary: Uses a correctly configured that provides compatible JSON format for the Cucumber Messages standard. These options should work with System.Text.Json v6 or above.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.PubSub.BindingMessagesGenerator
member.summary: This class is used at test start-up to iterate through the to generate messages for each of the , and . The binding items found are also cached for use during the processing of test cases.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.PubSub.CucumberMessageBroker
member.summary: Cucumber Message implementation is a simple Pub/Sub implementation. This broker mediates between the (singleton) CucumberMessagePublisher and (one or more) Formatters. The pub/sub mechanism is considered to be turned "OFF" if no sinks are registered or if none of them are configured.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.PubSub.CucumberMessagePublisher
member.summary: This class is responsible for publishing Cucumber Messages to the . It uses the set of to track overall execution of features and steps and drive generation of messages. It uses the interface to force the runtime to load it during startup (although it is not an external plugin per se).

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Formatters.PubSub.CucumberMessagePublisher.GetFeatureExecutionTracker``1(``0)
member.summary: Helper method used by the event handlers to retrieve the feature execution tracker for the given event.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Formatters.PubSub.CucumberMessagePublisher.GetFeatureId(Reqnroll.Events.IExecutionEvent)
member.summary: Helper method to extract feature name from different event types.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.RuntimeSupport.FeatureLevelCucumberMessages
member.summary: This class is used at Code Generation time to provide serialized representations of the Source, GherkinDocument, and Pickles to be used at runtime.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Formatters.RuntimeSupport.PickleJar
member.summary: This class is used at runtime to provide the appropriate PickleId and PickleStepId to the steps.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.HookAttribute.Order
member.summary: The order in which the hook will be executed. Lower numbers go first. Orders are only applicable for hooks of the same type. Hooks with the same priority will have non-deterministic execution order. Default value is 10,000.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.BeforeTestRunAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Constructs a new BeforeTestRunAttribute with a default Order of 10000

member.name: T:Reqnroll.BeforeScenarioAttribute
member.summary: Specifies a hook to be executed before each scenario.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.BeforeAttribute
member.summary: Specifies a hook to be executed before each scenario. This attribute is a synonym to .

member.name: T:Reqnroll.AfterScenarioAttribute
member.summary: Specifies a hook to be executed after each scenario.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.AfterAttribute
member.summary: Specifies a hook to be executed after each scenario. This attribute is a synonym to .

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Infrastructure.ContextManager.StackedInternalContextManager`1
member.summary: Implementation of internal context manager which keeps a stack of contexts, rather than a single one. This allows the contexts to be used when a new context is created before the previous context has been completed which is what happens when a step calls other steps. This means that the step contexts will be reported correctly even when there is a nesting of steps calling steps.
member.typeparam: A type derived from ReqnrollContext, which needs to be managed in a way

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Infrastructure.ContextManager.StackedInternalContextManager`1.#ctor(Reqnroll.Tracing.ITestTracer)
member.summary: Implementation of internal context manager which keeps a stack of contexts, rather than a single one. This allows the contexts to be used when a new context is created before the previous context has been completed which is what happens when a step calls other steps. This means that the step contexts will be reported correctly even when there is a nesting of steps calling steps.
member.typeparam: A type derived from ReqnrollContext, which needs to be managed in a way

member.name: P:Reqnroll.Infrastructure.ContextManager.CurrentTopLevelStepDefinitionType
member.summary: Holds the StepDefinitionType of the last step that was executed from the actual feature file, excluding the types of the steps that were executed during the calling of a step

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Infrastructure.ITestObjectResolver
member.summary: Resolves user created test objects from different scopes (scenario, feature, test thread).

remarks.para: The test objects might be dependent on particular Reqnroll infrastructure, therefore the implemented resolution logic should support resolving the following objects (from the provided Reqnroll container): , , and (to be able to resolve any other Reqnroll infrastucture). So basically the resolution of these classes has to be forwarded to the original container.
If the resolved (top level) object implements , the method must be called, passing in the original Reqnroll container. (The base class needs this.)

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Infrastructure.ReqnrollOutputHelper
member.summary: Provides methods for writing test output and adding attachments during test execution.
member.remarks:
This class is designed to facilitate the logging of test output and the management of test-related attachments. It integrates with the test execution event _publisher, trace listener, and attachment handler to ensure that output and attachments are properly handled and recorded.
This class needs further refactoring to make it asynchronous so that the TestThreadExecutionEventPublisher can be invoked asynchronously.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.ITestRunner.TestWorkerId
member.summary: The ID of the parallel test worker processing the current scenario.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Plugins.DotNetCorePluginAssemblyLoader
member.summary: This class is used for .NET only (not .NET Framework)

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Plugins.DotNetCorePluginAssemblyResolver
member.summary: This class is used for .NET (not .NET Framework) based frameworks only. See .

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Plugins.DotNetCorePluginAssemblyResolver.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: This class is used for .NET (not .NET Framework) based frameworks only. See .

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Plugins.DotNetFrameworkPluginAssemblyLoader
member.summary: This class is used for .NET Framework v4.* only. For .NET +6 is used instead. See .

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Plugins.DotNetFrameworkPluginAssemblyResolver
member.summary: This class is used for .NET Framework 4.* only. See .

member.name: M:Reqnroll.Plugins.DotNetFrameworkPluginAssemblyResolver.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: This class is used for .NET Framework 4.* only. See .

member.name: E:Reqnroll.Plugins.RuntimePluginEvents.CustomizeScenarioDependencies
member.summary: Use this event to customize the object container which will subsequently be provided to each Scenario.

remarks.para: Note that you may not resolve the from the container exposed by this event, attempts to do so will raise . This event is invoked before the scenario context is ready to be resolved. If you would like information about the Scenario, please resolve instead.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.ReqnrollContext.IsDisposed
member.summary: Used to verify disposal of the context in tests.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.RuleInfo
member.summary: Contains information about the rule currently being executed.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.RuleInfo.Title
member.summary: The title (name) of the rule.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.RuleInfo.Description
member.summary: The description of the rule.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.RuleInfo.Tags
member.summary: Direct tags of the rule.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.ScenarioContext.GetBindingInstance(System.Type)
member.summary: Called by Reqnroll infrastructure when an instance of a binding class is needed.
member.param: The type of the binding class.
member.returns: The binding class instance
member.remarks: The binding classes are the classes with the [Binding] attribute, that might contain step definitions, hooks or step argument transformations. The method is called when any binding method needs to be called.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.ScenarioInfo
member.summary: Contains information about the scenario currently being executed.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.ScenarioInfo.Tags
member.summary: Direct tags of the scenario, including tags of the examples block.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.ScenarioInfo.CombinedTags
member.summary: Contains direct tags and tags inherited from the feature and the rule.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.ScenarioInfo.Arguments
member.summary: The arguments used to execute a scenario outline example.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.ScenarioInfo.Title
member.summary: The title (name) of the scenario.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.ScenarioInfo.Description
member.summary: The description of the scenario.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.ScenarioInfo.PickleIdIndex
member.summary: The PickleIdIndex of the test scenario when exported as a Cucumber Messages "pickle". Used internally. The index is the sequential number of the pickle in the list of pickles generated from the feature file. The index is "replaced" by real unique identifiers () during event.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.ScenarioInfo.PickleStepSequence
member.summary: The list of step PickleIds in the step sequence for this test. Used internally at runtime.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.ScenarioInfo.PickleId
member.summary: This holds the unique identifier for the test ("pickle") represented by this scenario info. Used internally at runtime.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.ScopeAttribute
member.summary: Restricts the binding attributes (step definition, hook, etc.) to be applied only in a specific scope.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.StepArgumentTransformationAttribute
member.summary: Specifies the method to be used as a custom step definition parameter conversion.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.StepArgumentTransformationAttribute.Regex
member.summary: The regular expression that have to match the step argument. The entire argument is passed to the method if omitted. Please note that Cucumber Expressions are not supported for step argument transformations.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.StepArgumentTransformationAttribute.Name
member.summary: The custom parameter type name to be used in Cucumber Expressions

member.name: P:Reqnroll.StepArgumentTransformationAttribute.Order
member.summary: Specifies the deterministic order for step argument transformations. Lower numbers have higher priority. Default value is 10000.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.StepArgumentTransformationAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a Step Argument Transformation
member.param: The regular expression that must match the step argument. The entire argument is passed to the method if omitted. Please note that Cucumber Expressions are not supported for step argument transformations.
Specifies the deterministic order for step argument transformations. Lower numbers have higher priority.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.StepInfo.PickleStepId
member.summary: The unique identifier for the current step execution. Used internally at runtime.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Table
member.summary: An alias for the class for backwards compatibility.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.TagHelper
member.summary: Provides helper methods around tags.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.TagHelper.ContainsIgnoreTag(System.String[])
member.summary: Checks whether the supplied tags contain the ignore tag
member.param: The tags to check.
member.returns: A boolean that indicates whether or not the ignore tag is present.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.TagHelper.CombineTags(System.String[],System.String[])
member.summary: Combines feature tags and rule tags in a way that both can be null or empty. Duplicates are removed.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.TestRunnerManager.TestWorkerContainerHint
member.summary: Contains hints to for the test runner manager to choose the test runners from multiple available ones in a more optimal way. Our goal is to keep the test runner "sticky" to the test framework workers so that no unnecessary feature context switches occur. Currently, we remember the feature info and the managed thread ID to help this.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.TestRunnerManager.TestWorkerContainerHint.#ctor(Reqnroll.FeatureInfo,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Contains hints to for the test runner manager to choose the test runners from multiple available ones in a more optimal way. Our goal is to keep the test runner "sticky" to the test framework workers so that no unnecessary feature context switches occur. Currently, we remember the feature info and the managed thread ID to help this.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.TestRunnerManager.TestWorkerContainerHint.GetDistance(Reqnroll.TestRunnerManager.TestWorkerContainerHint,Reqnroll.FeatureInfo)
member.summary: Returns information about how optimal the provided hint for the current situation. Smaller number means more optimal.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.TestRunnerManager.GetCallingAssembly(System.String)
member.summary: This is a workaround method solving not correctly working Assembly.GetCallingAssembly() when called from async method (due to state machine).

member.name: M:Reqnroll.TestRunnerManager.GetTestRunnerForAssembly(System.Reflection.Assembly,Reqnroll.Infrastructure.IContainerBuilder,Reqnroll.FeatureInfo)
member.summary: Provides a test runner for the specified or current assembly with optionally a custom container builder and a feature hint. When a feature hint is provided the test runner manager will attempt to return the same test runner that was used for that feature before.
member.param: The test assembly. If omitted or invoked with null, the calling assembly is used.
The container builder to be used to set up Reqnroll dependencies. If omitted or invoked with null, the default container builder is used.
If specified, it is used as a hint for the test runner manager to choose the test runner that has been used for the feature before, if possible.
member.returns: A test runner that can be used to interact with Reqnroll.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.Tracing.IThreadSafeTraceListener
member.summary: Marker interface for trace listener that do not need queued execution

member.name: T:Reqnroll.UnitTestProvider.IUnitTestRuntimeProvider
member.summary: Runtime services provided by the test execution framework.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.UnitTestProvider.IUnitTestRuntimeProvider.TestPending(System.String)
member.summary: Forces the test to be pending. When the provider does not support pending tests, this method should throw an .
member.param: The message to be included in the test result.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.UnitTestProvider.IUnitTestRuntimeProvider.TestInconclusive(System.String)
member.summary: Forces the test to be inconclusive. When the provider does not support inconclusive tests it can also delegate to .
member.param: The message to be included in the test result.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.UnitTestProvider.IUnitTestRuntimeProvider.TestIgnore(System.String)
member.summary: Forces the test to be ignored. When the provider does not support ignored tests it can also delegate to .
member.param: The message to be included in the test result.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.UnitTestProvider.IUnitTestRuntimeProvider.DetectExecutionStatus(System.Exception)
member.summary: Detects dynamically skipped or pending tests based on the exception type. Should return , if the exception represents a skipped tests (e.g. ignored or inconclusive); when the exception represents a pending state and null in all other cases.
member.param: The exception that has been thrown during the step execution.
member.returns: The detected or null in all other cases.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.IsExternalInit
member.summary: Reserved to be used by the compiler for tracking metadata. This class should not be used by developers in source code.
